description: Monitor your Neon Postgres database — connections, storage, Local File Cache, replication lag, and compute metrics. Compatible with Neon's OpenTelemetry integration.
title: NeonDB Overview

endpoint_id.name: endpoint_id
endpoint_id.queryValue: SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'endpoint_id') AS `endpoint_id` FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE metric_name = 'neon_connection_counts' GROUP BY `endpoint_id`

widgets.description: Total number of active database connections
widgets.title: Active Connections

widgets.description: Total size of the database in bytes
widgets.title: DB Total Size

widgets.description: Local File Cache hit rate percentage (hits / (hits + misses) * 100)
widgets.title: LFC Hit Rate

widgets.description: Number of connections grouped by state (active, idle, other)
widgets.title: Connections by State

widgets.description: PgBouncer client and server connection counts
widgets.title: PgBouncer Connections

widgets.description: Local File Cache hits vs misses over time
widgets.title: LFC Hits vs Misses

widgets.description: Local File Cache used bytes vs cache size limit
widgets.title: LFC Usage

widgets.description: Replication delay in seconds over time
widgets.title: Replication Delay (seconds)

widgets.description: Replication delay in bytes over time
widgets.title: Replication Delay (bytes)

widgets.description: System load averages over 1, 5, and 15 minute windows
widgets.title: Load Average

widgets.description: Database row insert, update, and delete operations per second
widgets.title: DB Operations

widgets.description: Number of deadlocks detected in the database
widgets.title: Deadlocks
